name: Bird's Nest Coffee
tagline: Third-wave specialty coffee and fresh sourdough in Haleiwa — started from a van, now a proper North Shore local favorite.
mustOrder: any seasonal latte — rotating specials with local flavors
fresh sourdough baked goods — made in-house daily
parking: Lot on Kamehameha Hwy in Haleiwa town
talkStory: Bird's Nest started as a coffee van before opening a brick-and-mortar in Haleiwa in May 2024. On a stretch of the North Shore dominated by acai bowl shops and surf brand cafes, Bird's Nest brings genuine third-wave coffee craft — specialty beans, proper extraction, and seasonal drinks that change regularly. The sourdough baked goods are made in-house and sell out early. The vibe is chill and local, drawing North Shore residents who want good coffee without driving to town. A welcome addition to Haleiwa's food scene that isn't chasing the tourist dollar.
